1755130.name: ELE RAMPAGE
1755130.description: Play as an elephant on a rampage!  The objective is simple, destroy killer robots to score points Features high-paced action as more and more robots spawn with deadly intent. You can now play as both Ele the Elephant who uses a water blast to destroy her enemies and Wooly the Mammoth who prefers to take things up close and personal, each character has their own unique style. Players can also compete to find out who is the best using the online leaderboards.
